title: AI Fund: Home
full_text:
Co-founding companies together from idea to Impact
AI Fund is a venture studio. We collaborate with entrepreneurs, venture funds, and corporate partners to create great companies that move humanity forward.
Build With Us
From idea to funded startup in 3 months. Join our proven process to validate, build, and scale your AI company.
Apply Now
About AI Fund
Accelerating AI Innovation,
One startup at a Time
Founded by Andrew Ng, AI Fund is backed by over $370 million. As a venture studio, we work alongside entrepreneurs, venture funds, and corporate partners to build new companies rapidly and increase their odds of success. The studio is supported by top-tier VCs and partners including Sequoia Capital, NEA, Nikkei, and AES.
Meet The Team
We've partnered with extraordinary founders
We build AI companies alongside founders who bring deep technical expertise and a clear vision for what AI can do in their field. When that expertise meets our company-building methodology, the result is ventures designed to solve real problems at scale.
From helping first responders save lives to simplifying supply chains, to transforming how governments access services, these collaborations turn hard problems into durable companies. Each venture is built on the strengths of our partners and our proven company-building process for creating powerful AI businesses.
Meet Our Portfolio Companies
IrisGo
The digital butler for the AI PC era
Jeffrey Lai, CEO & Co-founder | Yichen Chu, COO & Co-founder
Profitmind
The AI Profit engine for retail
Dr. Mark Chrystal, CEO & Co-founder
Workera
Enterprise verification platform to future-proof organizations
Kian Katanforoosh, CEO & Co-founder
Workhelix
Helping enterprises turn AI technology into productivity
Dr. Erik Brynjolfsson, Co-chairman & Co-founder | Dr. Andrew McAfee, Co-chairman & Co-founder | James Milin, CEO & Co-founder | Dr. Daniel Rock, CTO & Co-founder
Factored
Expert engineers in AI, machine learning, and data
Israel Niezen, CEO & Co-founder
Team
Portfolio
Insights
Careers
Contact
Build With Us
